The '''Amulet of Trust''' was an artifact found at the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Sacred Place]]. When he became a [[Junior Representative/Legends|representative]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] was given this jewelry to wear around his neck.

==Appearances==
*{{Film|II}} {{1st}}
